sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantung inn nuam ah kikhawm ding in-ah,
Ni nuam zing sang gungei cik khuk-ah;
Kikhawm ding
hong ngakte tawh kimu leng,
Lungdam nuamsa in la i sa ding.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kikhawm ding innpi
ah,
A nuam gun pi le ciktui gei-ah;
Hong ngak i lawmte tawh,
Nuam in Topa min i phat ding
hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong tel Topa hong hehpihna pha a,
I lawmte ei hong ngak in om ta;
Dahna
tawh kipelh in i om ding hi,
Kimuh ciang lungdam in la sa ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong gum Topa Jesuh
tokhom tung ah,
Lawmte aw a mai kikhawm in-ah;
Hong itna hong hehpihna a pha a,
A minthanna
phat in la sa ni.
